name: Paladin
abilities:
The Wall — heavy defense (🛡3) and always blocks 1 hit (+1🛡 base). Rolls +1 attack die against minions.

2☼: Give an ally +1 to their next roll (you lose 1 life).
3☼: Draw an extra card.

End your turn next to an ally to regain 2 life.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense; shields block AND scramble you 1 space each. Break line of sight to be safe.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.
7◆: Allies 1 space away get +1 to their rolls.

5◆ (6☼): Teleport next to any living ally (lose 2 life).

name: Barbarian
abilities:
Cleave — high attack (⚔4). +1 attack die against minions, and regain 2 life whenever your strike destroys a minion.

4☼: On your next move, destroy every minion you end adjacent to along the way.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense; shields block and scramble. If caught in a building, leave through a door for -2 life.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (3☼): Haul every minion 6+ spaces away next to you and fight them (spend extra ☼ to reach farther).

name: Hunter
abilities:
Marksman — reach 2 (strikes 2 spaces away).

3☼: Summon your pet (🐾 button) — a hero-side piece (⚔1 / 🛡1 / ❤3). 2☼: your pet takes an action. The pet shares your movement rolls (not bonus dice) and flies over obstacles (not walls). It is DESTROYED if it ever fights the monster itself.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense; your reach keeps you clear.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (6☼): Summon a second pet.

name: Scout
abilities:
Evasive — once each turn you may Flee even on 0 shields: you still take the hit but ALWAYS slip to safety (out of line of sight/reach).

1☼: +2 to your movement roll.
5֍: spend a movement roll as an action.

Escape: your Flee never fails to move you (see Evasive) — the best escape artist in the party.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (4☼): Dash to any wall in line of sight, then end your turn.

name: Wizard
abilities:
Glass cannon — frail in a fistfight (⚔1 / 🛡1 / ❤4); win through spell cards, not blows.

2☼: Reroll any of your dice this turn.
4☼: Draw an extra card.
You may discard a card to draw another.

Escape: Flee like any hero — you're fragile, so break line of sight fast.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
3◇: Relocate 1 door.
5◇: Relocate 1 door.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (6☼): Trade places with any object on the board.

name: Enchantress
abilities:
Controller — bends the board, not fists (⚔1 / 🛡1).

4☼: Walk through a wall.
5☼: Move a monster or an ally 1 space.
You may discard a card to draw another.

Escape: Flee like any hero — roll Defense, then reposition out of sight.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

4◆ (6☼): Play any ally's card on any hero.
5◆ (7☼): Use an action anywhere on the board.

name: Thief
abilities:
Assassin — high attack (⚔4); your attacks IGNORE WALLS — you strike through cover and your line of sight isn't blocked by walls. Moves diagonally (GREEN).

1☼ + 2֍: Use an action 2 spaces away.
5☼: Use an ally hero's card.

Escape: Flee like any hero — and slip through a wall to break line of sight instantly.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (6☼): Cannot be targeted or seen until your next turn.

name: Ranger
abilities:
Sharpshooter — reach 3, and +1 attack die when you strike from 2+ spaces away. Moves diagonally (GREEN).

2☼: Deal 2 damage to a minion in line of sight within reach.
3☼ + 4֍: Move an objective 1 space.

Escape: Flee like any hero — your range means you're rarely cornered.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (4☼): Reroll any of your movement dice.

name: Druid
abilities:
Shapeshifter — 3☼: Transform (persists until you change again; may be re-cast several times per turn). 4☼: Transform an ally for this turn.

BEAR: +1⚔ / +1🛡 (bruiser).
TURTLE: +2🛡 (shell).
CHEETAH: -1🛡, but +2 to movement rolls (fast, fragile).
DEER: -1🛡; for 1☼ restore 2 life to any hero (fragile healer).

Escape: Flee like any hero — BEAR/TURTLE flee best (more shields).
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (3☼): Draw an extra card.

name: Cleric
abilities:
Healer — solid defense (🛡3), weak attack (⚔1).

4☼: Restore 3 life to any living hero.
12☼: Revive any hero to half health (ends both heroes' turns).
Both your dice count as actions OR movement.

Escape: Flee like any hero — lean on your high defense to block and slip away.
objectiveAbilities:
2,5,6◇: Draw a card.
4◆: Gain a ֍ bonus die.
7◆: Gain a ☼ bonus die.

5◆ (3☼): Give an ally +2 to a roll (you lose 2 life).
